stories.title: xAI 起诉用户利用 Grok 生成儿童性虐待深度伪造
stories.sourceTitle: xAI sues a man for using Grok to generate CSAM ‘deepfakes’
stories.summary: xAI 起诉南卡罗来纳州男子 Terry Wayne Harwood，指控他故意使用 Grok 聊天机器人生成儿童性虐待材料。该案可能为 AI 模型滥用的法律责任树立先例。
stories.analysis: AI 公司首次因用户滥用其模型生成 CSAM 而直接起诉个人，显示平台开始主动追责。
stories.sourceExcerpt: The Elon Musk-owned xAI is suing a South Carolina man who allegedly used the company's Grok AI chatbot to generate child sexual abuse material (CSAM). In a lawsuit reported earlier by Reuters, xAI claims Terry Wayne Harwood "knowingly and intentionally used Gr

stories.title: AI 生成烂片成为新时代的“直接发行”捞金工具
stories.sourceTitle: AI slop movies are the new direct-to-video cash grabs
stories.summary: 与 Nolan 大片《奥德赛》票房火爆形成对比，AI 生成的劣质电影效仿过去直发录像带的模式，低成本快速牟利。
stories.analysis: AI 大幅降低了电影制作门槛，但内容质量参差不齐，可能加速行业泡沫。
stories.sourceExcerpt: This weekend, cinephiles across the world will march to their local theaters to feast their eyes on Christopher Nolan's new adaptation of The Odyssey. It's on track to rake in anywhere between $80-$100 million in just a few days. People are clearly excited to

stories.title: Suno 被黑数据泄露：训练数据来自 YouTube、Genius 和 Deezer 数百万歌曲
stories.sourceTitle: Suno snatched millions of songs from YouTube, Genius, and Deezer
stories.summary: 黑客事件曝光 Suno 从 YouTube Music、Deezer 和 Genius 等平台抓取大量歌曲和歌词用于训练其 AI 音乐生成器。
stories.analysis: 数据来源合法性再受质疑，AI 音乐公司面临严峻的版权诉讼风险。
stories.sourceExcerpt: Suno data obtained in a hacking incident has exposed that the AI music generator was trained by scraping millions of songs and lyrics from online audio platforms, including YouTube Music, Deezer, and Genius, 404 Media reports. Given that Suno has avoided revea

stories.title: 微软培训销售人员贬低 OpenAI 与 Anthropic 以推广自家模型
stories.sourceTitle: Microsoft is reportedly training salespeople to talk down OpenAI and Anthropic
stories.summary: 微软正训练销售人员宣传其内部 AI 模型比竞争对手更高效、更经济，销售话术直接指向 OpenAI 和 Anthropic。
stories.analysis: 微软与 OpenAI 关系出现裂痕，AI 市场从合作转向正面竞争。
stories.sourceExcerpt: Microsoft is looking to sell its in-house AI models as more efficient and cost-effective than its competitors' models.

stories.title: Apple Intelligence 获准在中国上线，采用阿里巴巴的 Qwen AI
stories.sourceTitle: Apple Intelligence approved for launch in China with Alibaba’s Qwen AI
stories.summary: 传闻已久的合作落地，Apple Intelligence 将使用阿里巴巴 Qwen 模型在中国市场推出，这对苹果关键市场的 AI 布局意义重大。
stories.analysis: 苹果借助本地合作伙伴规避监管，Qwen 获得重要落地场景，AI 生态竞争加剧。
stories.sourceExcerpt: The deal, which was rumored to be in the works last year, marks an important step for Apple's AI ambitions in a key market.

stories.title: 与苹果硬件诉讼缠身，OpenAI 发布 230 美元 Codex 键盘
stories.sourceTitle: Amid hardware legal battle, OpenAI releases a $230 keyboard for Codex
stories.summary: OpenAI 推出一款带灯的键盘作为编程助手 Codex 的配套硬件，诉讼期间仍继续硬件布局。
stories.analysis: OpenAI 硬件策略务实，先瞄准开发者群体，避免与苹果直接冲突。
stories.sourceExcerpt: OpenAI, which is in the middle of a legal battle with Apple over hardware trade theft allegations, just released a light-up keyboard designed to be paired with its agentic coding app.

stories.title: 微软借助 AI 修复创纪录的 570 个安全漏洞
stories.sourceTitle: Microsoft patches record number of security vulnerabilities, citing its use of AI
stories.summary: 微软在 7 月补丁星期二修复了 570 个安全漏洞，公司归功于 AI 在漏洞发现中的作用。
stories.analysis: AI 在安全漏洞发现中的潜力得到验证，可能重塑企业安全运维模式。
stories.sourceExcerpt: Microsoft's monthly release of security fixes, dubbed Patch Tuesday, resolved a record 570 security vulnerabilities across the company's product line, thanks to discoveries with AI.

stories.title: OpenAI 终于推出硬件，但仅限于 Codex 编程助手
stories.sourceTitle: OpenAI finally launches hardware… for Codex
stories.summary: OpenAI 发布一款与 Codex 配合使用的硬件键盘，而非传闻中与 Jony Ive 合作的 AI 设备。
stories.analysis: 硬件策略务实，先瞄准开发者群体，避免与苹果直接冲突。
stories.sourceExcerpt: OpenAI is finally releasing some hardware. No, it isn't the mysterious AI-powered device the company is developing with former Apple designer Jony Ive, a project already tangled up in a messy lawsuit. Instead, it's a product designed to be used with its coding

stories.title: SpaceX 股价跌至 135 美元 IPO 价，Starship 发射前夕市场降温
stories.sourceTitle: SpaceX falls to $135 IPO price ahead of Starship launch
stories.summary: SpaceX 股票从 IPO 后高点持续下跌，市场对 CEO 承诺趋于冷静。
stories.analysis: AI 相关公司估值回调，投资者更关注实际进展而非炒作。
stories.sourceExcerpt: The stock has steadily fallen from the euphoric post-IPO high, showing that markets may be sobering up to the promises CEO Elon Musk made before and after SpaceX went public.

stories.title: Thinking Machines 发布首个开源模型 Inkling，挑战通用 AI 模式
stories.sourceTitle: Thinking Machines amps up its bet against one-size-fits-all AI with its first open model, Inkling
stories.summary: Thinking Machines 经过一年半的低调建设，首次公开推出开源模型 Inkling，强调差异化而非通用。
stories.analysis: 开源模型阵营再添新玩家，聚焦垂直场景避免与巨头正面竞争。
stories.sourceExcerpt: It's the company's first public proof point after a year and a half spent building AI infrastructure largely out of public view.

stories.title: 黑客行为揭示 Suno 可能抓取 YouTube 数据训练 AI 音乐生成器
stories.sourceTitle: Hack suggests AI music generator Suno scraped YouTube for training data
stories.summary: 黑客利用员工凭证访问源代码，发现 Suno 大规模抓取音频数据的过程。
stories.analysis: 数据来源合法性存疑，Suno 面临版权诉讼风险。
stories.sourceExcerpt: The hacker used an employee's credentials to access source code, which revealed how Suno scraped decades of audio.

stories.title: Whatnot 收购 AI 初创公司 Shaped，强化实时直播购物推荐
stories.sourceTitle: Whatnot acquires Shaped to power real-time live shopping recommendations
stories.summary: 直播购物平台 Whatnot 收购专注实时推荐和搜索的机器学习公司 Shaped，以提升个性化体验。
stories.analysis: AI 在电商直播领域的应用加速，收购成为快速补足技术短板的手段。
stories.sourceExcerpt: Livestream shopping platform Whatnot has acquired AI startup Shaped, a machine learning company focused on real-time recommendations and search. The deal will bolster Whatnot’s personalization and discovery features as it expands into new product categories.

stories.title: 美国通过州与联邦行动推进 AI 安全
stories.sourceTitle: The US is advancing AI safety through state and federal action
stories.summary: OpenAI 提出“反向联邦制”AI 治理方法，州法律帮助构建国家层面安全框架。
stories.analysis: OpenAI 积极参与政策制定，试图引导 AI 监管方向。
stories.sourceExcerpt: OpenAI outlines a “reverse federalism” approach to AI governance, where state laws help build a national framework for safe, democratic AI.

stories.title: 探秘 Ode with Anthropic：AI 服务将成为企业级未来
stories.sourceTitle: Inside Ode with Anthropic, the startup betting AI services are the future of enterprise
stories.summary: Ode 是由 Anthropic、Blackstone 等支持的合资企业，专注于在企业中部署前向工程师提供 AI 服务。
stories.analysis: AI 落地从卖模型转向卖服务，工程化能力成为关键。
stories.sourceExcerpt: Can a handful of engineers really do the work of an army of consultants? That’s the bet behind Ode with Anthropic — the joint venture dedicated to embedding forward-deployed engineers in enterprise firms, backed by Anthropic, Blackstone, Hellman & Friedman, Go

stories.title: Anthropic 与 Blackstone 押注：AI 的万亿美元商机在于实施而非模型
stories.sourceTitle: Anthropic, Blackstone bet the next trillion-dollar AI business is implementation, not just models
stories.summary: Anthropic 支持的 Ode 成立，认为将前向工程师嵌入企业是加速 AI 采用的关键。
stories.analysis: 资本方认为企业级 AI 部署的工程服务市场巨大，可能催生新业态。
stories.sourceExcerpt: Anthropic-backed Ode launches as AI labs bet that embedding forward-deployed engineers inside enterprises is the key to accelerating enterprise AI adoption.

stories.title: Reelful 的 AI 将相册照片自动转化为社交媒体短视频
stories.sourceTitle: Reelful’s AI turns your camera roll into short-form videos for social media
stories.summary: 该 App 面向希望创作社交内容但觉得剪辑复杂的用户，AI 自动从相册生成短视频。
stories.analysis: AI 让内容创作民主化，但同质化问题可能随之而来。
stories.sourceExcerpt: The app is designed for people who want to create social content, but find traditional video editing tools too complex or time-consuming.

stories.title: Rime 获得 2400 万美元 A 轮融资，帮助企业处理客户电话
stories.sourceTitle: Rime picks up $24M Series A to help enterprises field customer calls
stories.summary: Rime 每月处理超 1 亿通电话，本轮融资将用于扩展 AI 客服能力。
stories.analysis: AI 客服赛道持续火热，电话场景成为重要战场。
stories.sourceExcerpt: Rime is handling over 100 million calls each month across multiple companies.

stories.title: GPT-Red：通过自我博弈提升 AI 安全鲁棒性
stories.sourceTitle: GPT-Red: Unlocking Self-Improvement for Robustness
stories.summary: OpenAI 发布自动化红队系统 GPT-Red，利用自博弈提高安全、对齐和提示注入鲁棒性。
stories.analysis: 自我改进的 AI 安全方法可能成为未来模型保护的标准实践。
stories.sourceExcerpt: Explore GPT-Red, OpenAI’s automated red teaming system that uses self-play to improve AI safety, alignment, and prompt injection robustness.

stories.title: 印度 AI 编程初创公司 Emergent 获 1.3 亿美元 C 轮融资，晋升独角兽
stories.sourceTitle: Indian AI coding startup Emergent becomes a unicorn with $130M Series C
stories.summary: Emergent 年化收入达 1.2 亿美元，拥有超过 20 万付费客户。
stories.analysis: AI 编程工具市场快速增长，印度企业崭露头角。
stories.sourceExcerpt: The startup has reached a $120 million annualized revenue run rate and more than 200,000 paying customers.

stories.title: TCP/IP 之父 Vint Cerf 制定标准，计划让 AI 代理自由上网
stories.sourceTitle: Vint Cerf is working on a plan to unleash AI agents on the open internet
stories.summary: Cerf 正在制定一种标准，用于在开放互联网中识别 AI 代理。
stories.analysis: AI 代理的国际标准开始萌芽，可能影响未来网络架构。
stories.sourceExcerpt: The guy behind TCP/IP is working on a standard for identifying AI agents in the wild.

stories.title: Meta 被指控使用有偏见的 AI 定向裁员
stories.sourceTitle: Meta accused of using biased AI targeting for mass layoffs
stories.summary: 26 名前 Meta 员工起诉公司，称其使用 AI 工具不公平地针对休假工人进行裁员。
stories.analysis: AI 在人力资源决策中的偏见问题引发法律挑战。
stories.sourceExcerpt: A group of 26 former Meta employees is suing the company over claims that it used AI tools to unfairly target workers on leave with layoffs, as reported earlier by Reuters. In the lawsuit, the employees allege Meta determined which workers to dismiss based on

stories.title: Spotify 变身 AI 聊天机器人，Premium 用户可语音交谈选歌
stories.sourceTitle: Spotify is now an AI chatbot, too
stories.summary: Spotify 测试“Talk to Spotify”功能，Premium 用户可通过对话式聊天机器人探索音乐、有声书和播客。
stories.analysis: 流媒体平台争相引入 AI 交互，提升用户体验和粘性。
stories.sourceExcerpt: Spotify is experimenting with a new AI feature that allows Premium subscribers to play and explore music, audiobooks, and podcasts by having conversations with a chatbot. The "Talk to Spotify" feature appears across the Home and Now Playing view on Spotify's m

stories.title: 德国电信借助 OpenAI 重塑电信业务：客服、网络、语音全面 AI 化
stories.sourceTitle: How Deutsche Telekom is rewiring telecommunications with AI
stories.summary: 德国电信成为 AI 原生电信公司，利用 OpenAI 改造客户服务、员工工作流、网络运营和语音未来。
stories.analysis: 大型企业 AI 转型案例增多，OpenAI 的企业业务增长强劲。
stories.sourceExcerpt: How Deutsche Telekom is becoming an AI-native telco with OpenAI-transforming customer service, employee workflows, network operations, and the future of voice.

stories.title: OpenAI 与沃尔顿家族基金会合作，帮助 K-12 教师掌握实用 AI 技能
stories.sourceTitle: Helping K–12 educators build practical AI skills
stories.summary: OpenAI Academy 推出实操性 AI Skills Jams，面向 K-12 教育工作者。
stories.analysis: AI 教育从大学下沉到基础教育，OpenAI 培养未来用户。
stories.sourceExcerpt: OpenAI Academy and the Walton Family Foundation are bringing hands-on AI Skills Jams to help K–12 educators build practical AI skills for the classroom.

stories.title: 三菱日联金融集团与 OpenAI 推进 AI 原生组织转型
stories.sourceTitle: MUFG aims to become AI-native with OpenAI
stories.summary: MUFG 使用 ChatGPT Enterprise 构建 AI-native 组织，改进内部工作流并推出新的 AI 金融服务。
stories.analysis: 金融机构率先拥抱 AI-native，可能引领行业变革。
stories.sourceExcerpt: MUFG uses ChatGPT Enterprise to build an AI-native organization, improve workflows, and deliver new AI-powered financial services at scale.

stories.title: OpenAI 发布 GeneBench-Pro，评估基因相关 AI 能力
stories.sourceTitle: Introducing GeneBench-Pro
stories.summary: 新基准测试使用复杂真实世界数据集，评估 AI 在基因组学、生物学和科学研究中的性能。
stories.analysis: AI 在生命科学领域的评估标准化，可能加速应用落地。
stories.sourceExcerpt: Introducing GeneBench-Pro, a new benchmark testing AI performance in genomics, biology, and scientific research using complex, real-world datasets.

stories.title: 马斯克也开始 L4 降维 L2 了！FSD 正式进入反转时刻
stories.sourceTitle: 马斯克也开始L4降维L2了！FSD正式进入反转时刻
stories.summary: FSD 与 Robotaxi 共用一套模型，马斯克的自动驾驶策略转向务实落地。
stories.analysis: 行业从 L4 高歌猛进转向商业化落地，可能加速变现。
stories.sourceExcerpt: FSD、Robotaxi共用一套模型

stories.title: Qwen3Guard：Token 流实时安全防护模型
stories.sourceTitle: Qwen3Guard: Real-time Safety for Your Token Stream
stories.summary: Qwen 团队发布首个安全护栏模型 Qwen3Guard，基于 Qwen3 微调，专为安全分类场景设计。
stories.analysis: AI 安全从通用模型向专用防护模型演进，阿里云重视合规。
stories.sourceExcerpt: Tech Report GitHub Hugging Face ModelScope DISCORD Introduction We are excited to introduce Qwen3Guard, the first safety guardrail model in the Qwen family. Built upon the powerful Qwen3 foundation models and fine-tuned specifically for safety classificatoin,
